name: Axis Magnus Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹15,00,000 in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 2 EDGE Points per ₹200 spent on all purchases
12X EDGE Points (12 per ₹200) on bookings via Axis Travel EDGE portal
5X EDGE Points (5 per ₹200) on dining spends

redemptionOptions: Flights and hotels via Axis Travel EDGE portal (1 EDGE Point = up to ₹1)
Transfer to airline partners (InterMiles, Singapore KrisFlyer, Etihad Guest, etc.)

welcomeBenefits.condition: Credited on first transaction within 45 days

additionalBenefits: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access
12X rewards on Axis Travel EDGE portal bookings
Priority Pass with unlimited visits for primary cardholder
Transfer EDGE Points to 16+ airline loyalty programs
pros: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access is a standout benefit
12X rewards on Axis Travel EDGE portal offers massive value for travellers
25,000 welcome points (₹12,500 value) offset the joining fee
Milestone benefit of 25,000 points at ₹7.5L spend adds further value
Low 2% foreign currency markup for international transactions
cons: High annual fee of ₹12,500 requires significant spend to justify
Fee waiver threshold of ₹15 lakh is steep for most users
Accelerated rewards are best unlocked via Axis Travel EDGE portal
EDGE Points lose value if not redeemed on travel portal
idealFor: Frequent travellers who book through Axis Travel EDGE for 12X rewards
High spenders seeking unlimited lounge access and strong milestone benefits
Users who transfer points to airline partners for premium cabin redemptions

faqs.question: Is the lounge access really unlimited?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Axis Magnus offers unlimited complimentary domestic and international lounge visits for the primary cardholder through Priority Pass and Dreamfolks.

faqs.question: How valuable are EDGE Points on the Magnus card?
faqs.answer: EDGE Points are worth ₹0.50 each when redeemed as statement credit, but can be worth up to ₹1 each when redeemed on the Axis Travel EDGE portal for flights and hotels.

faqs.question: What is the milestone benefit and how does it work?
faqs.answer: When you spend ₹7,50,000 in a year, you receive 25,000 bonus EDGE Points (worth ₹12,500). This effectively makes the card free if you hit this spend threshold.

faqs.question: Can I transfer EDGE Points to airline miles?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can transfer EDGE Points to 16+ airline partners including Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer, InterMiles, Etihad Guest, British Airways Avios, and Turkish Airlines Miles&Smiles.
